Suggested Title: Integrating zipBoard with CI/CD Tools: GitHub Actions and GitLab CI

Gap Description: No detailed articles on configuring Single Sign‑On (SAML, OAuth), IP whitelisting, and security policies for enterprise accounts.

Gap Description: Lack of comprehensive documentation on creating and managing webhooks, automating tasks via the zipBoard API, and reference payload schemas.
Suggested Title: Automating Workflows with zipBoard Webhooks and API: Full Reference Guide
